ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.G.Docs: The IP address assigned to the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.N.Docs: The group sources' network interface IDs to register with the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.T.Docs: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.
